Jutaituba REDD+ Project
Project Type: Agriculture Forestry and Other Land Use
Retirement Details: As part of its ESG Plan and decarbonisation strategy, TIM S.A. uses carbon credits exclusively as a complementary measure to offset residual direct greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions (Scope 1) related to the 2025 reporting year, following the implementation of internal emission reduction actions. The credits used were sourced from the Jutaituba REDD+ Project, a forest conservation initiative located in the state of Pará, Brazil, which seeks to contribute to the reduction of emissions associated with deforestation and forest degradation, supported by satellite monitoring and field based activities, as well as the generation of additional socio environmental benefits. The Jutaituba Farm region has high environmental relevance, hosting a rich diversity of Amazonian fauna and flora species, including at least 24 species classified as being under some degree of threat according to the IUCN Red List, some of which are endemic to the region.
